title: Connected Board Preview
excerpt: When viewing a board line item that has a connected board, provide an easier way to see all of the connected board items. Currently, you have to remember to select the plus icon to see a list of everything. It’s not as i…

posts.author: amber.gillis (Amber Gillis)
posts.cookedHtml: When viewing a board line item that has a connected board, provide an easier way to see all of the connected board items. Currently, you have to remember to select the plus icon to see a list of everything. It’s not as intuitive, because “+” typically means you want to add another one. There isn’t another way to see all of the selected connected boards at one time though.
